## Vertical

(Which `industries/<vertical>/`. If proposing a new vertical
entirely, name it and reference the standard certification body.)

## Application

(One paragraph: what control law / signal path / model is this.)

## Math description

(High-level math + chain orders / cost classes you expect. Reference
DLMF / canonical literature where possible.)

## Certification target

(DO-178C / ISO 26262 / IEC 62304 / MIL-STD-882 / IEC 61508 / NRC /
none. If certified, what level: ASIL-D / DAL-A / Class III / etc.)

## Reference implementation (optional)

(If you've prototyped in MATLAB / C / etc., link or paste the
reference.)

## Related patents

(Methods used. Reference `patents/index.md`.)
